title: Kingdom Keys - Re:Mind
description: An expansive addon for Kingdom Keys!
body:
## Previously known as: Magicks Addon

The mod's aim is to add more to the Kingdom Keys mod! Namely spells and abilities from other Kingdom Hearts games and Final Fantasy! Now adding forms and abilities as well! 

**The page here will be updated as more is added!**


**NOTE! KINGDOM KEYS 2 IS REQUIRED!!!**

Adds **10+** Spells!

Adds various abilities!

Adds Shotlocks!

Adds Armor, Accessories, and Keyblades!

Adds 3 New Drive Forms!
